title: Vindicate Me

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When enemies rise against my soul
And strangers seek to take their toll
Your name alone will make me whole
My strength, my shield, my all

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Through shadows dark and valleys deep
Your faithful love, a watch You keep
The price my foes have sown, they'll reap
While I stand firm and tall

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Vindicate me, set me free
By Your power, rescue me
Every prayer You hear me speak
Every tear upon my cheek Your justice sets me free

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: In silence, Lord,
I sought Your face
When darkness tried to steal Your grace
You met me in that sacred space
And caught me when I'd fall

sections.label: Bridge
lines: When morning breaks and night has passed
Your truth remains, Your love will last
The storm that raged has fled at last
My heart can now recall

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: With grateful praise I lift my voice
In Your deliverance I rejoice
My heart has made its final choice
To answer to Your call

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Vindicate me, set me free
By Your power, rescue me
Every prayer You hear me speak
Every tear upon my cheek Your justice sets me free

epigraph: For strangers are risen up against me
